caption:
The science behind Sofwave will change how you think about skin tightening.

Traditional ultrasound devices target a single depth. Sofwave's Synchronous Ultrasound Parallel Beam (SUPERB) technology delivers focused energy at precisely 1.5mm depth—the sweet spot of the mid-dermis where collagen and elastin fibers live.

What happens at that depth:
• Controlled thermal zones heat to 60-70°C
• Existing collagen contracts and tightens immediately
• Your body launches a wound-healing response that produces NEW collagen over 3-6 months
• Integrated cooling protects the epidermis throughout treatment

One session. No surgery. No needles. No downtime.

Clinical studies show measurable lifting and tightening of the brow, jawline, and submental area (yes—the chin).

This is the technology that makes facelifts optional.

Discover Sofwave at Rani. Consultation link in bio.
mediaDescription: Animated Reel or video showing Sofwave technology in action: ultrasound beams targeting the mid-dermis layer, with a cross-section skin diagram. Before/after jawline silhouette. Clinical yet beautiful visual with Rani's gold accent palette.
